changelog:
This information is based on draft standards circulated for public enquiry (or DIS), or information
                    published by CEN-CENELEC, in relation to the EU AI Act Standardisation Request
This mapping represents the intended coverage as standards are being developed

Standards are at different development stages - check stage indicators for maturity. A good overview
                    of the overall process can be found here .

Final harmonised
                        standards can differ from current drafts, drafts at Enquiry stage are not approved by
                    national bodies

Some standards will contain normative
                        references , these often change during the standards development process
Always consult official EU AI Act text, the OJEU and published harmonised standards for compliance
2026-05-19 ISO/IEC 24970 Stage Progression Start of FDIS/Formal Vote
2026-05-19 prEN 18229-1 Stage Progression Start of Enquiry
2026-05-13 prEN 18228 Internal references Added internal normative reference from 18228 to 18229-1 per Enquiry text
2026-05-07 prEN 18228, 18282, 18286 Stage Progression Moved prEN 18228 and 18282 to Stage 40 and 18286 to 50.
2026-05-05 prEN 18229 Enhancement Added on-hover scopes for normative references
2026-04-27 prEN 18229 Project split Reflecting the split of 18229-1 into two parts, now -1 and -3
2026-03-26 prEN 18283 Stage progression Updated status of prEN 18283 to Stage 20
2026-03-24 prEN 18281 Scope amendments Updated scopes of prEN 18288 and 18286.
2026-03-24 prEN 18281 Stage progression Updated status of prEN 18281 to Stage 40
2026-02-22 Normative references Additional information Corrected location of prEN 18283 based on the latest information
2026-02-13 Normative references Additional information Added normative references based on the JTC 21 Inclusiveness newsletter
2026-01-08 FAQ Additional information Added FAQ section
2025-12-09 prEN 18229-2 Stage progression prEN 18229-2 launched for working draft consultation with national bodies
2025-12-01 All Mapping Initial publication of interactive standards mapping based on prEN 18286, Annex B, and CEN-CENELEC website project scopes.
Stage 10 (Red): Project approved and initial drafting underway
Stage 20 (Yellow): Working Draft or Committee Draft being developed

Stage 40 (Purple): Enquiry/DIS Draft - circulated to national bodies for
                            comment
Stage 50 (Teal): Approval stage - formal voting by national bodies
Stage 60 (Blue): Publication stage - standard is published
